ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the product */,
  "slug" TEXT /* Slug for the product URL */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product was added */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Status of the product (active or inactive) */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category the product belongs to */,
  "sub_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the subcategory the product belongs to */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "sku" TEXT /* Stock Keeping Unit for the product */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the product */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the product */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number to track changes */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* JSON field for additional product metadata */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_sub_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("sub_category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the category image */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the category */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the category */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number to track changes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Contact person at the supplier */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the supplier */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the supplier's website */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the supplier */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the supplier */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number to track changes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_variants" (
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product variant */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the variant belongs to */,
  "variant_name" TEXT /* Name of the variant (e.g., size, color) */,
  "variant_value" TEXT /* Value of the variant (e.g., M, Red) */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the variant */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Stock quantity of the variant */,
  "sku" TEXT /* Stock Keeping Unit for the variant */,
  "cost_price" TEXT /* Cost price of the variant */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the variant */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the variant */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number to track changes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_variants_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the image belongs to */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the image */,
  "alt_text" TEXT /* Alternative text for the image */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the image */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the image */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number to track changes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_images_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the review is for */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes indicating the review was helpful */,
  "unhelpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes indicating the review was unhelpful */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the review */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the review */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number to track changes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, customer, staff) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the user account */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the user account */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number to track changes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total_amount" TEXT /* Total amount of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Address where the order will be shipped */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Address where the order will be billed */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the order */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the order */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number to track changes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product variant */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the item */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the order item */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the order item */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number to track changes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_variant_id FOREIGN KEY ("variant_id") REFERENCES product_variants ("variant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory log */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product variant */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., add, subtract) */,
  "quantity_change" INTEGER /* Quantity of the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the change */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the change */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the log */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the log */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number to track changes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_logs_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_logs_variant_id FOREIGN KEY ("variant_id") REFERENCES product_variants ("variant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_attributes" (
  "attribute_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attribute */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "attribute_name" TEXT /* Name of the attribute (e.g., material, brand) */,
  "attribute_value" TEXT /* Value of the attribute (e.g., cotton, Nike) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the attribute */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the attribute */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number to track changes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attribute_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_attributes_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recommended product */,
  "recommended_date" TEXT /* Date the recommendation was made */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the recommendation */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the recommendation */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number to track changes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_recommendations_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
